야고보서 1:1.content: James, a servant of God and of the Lord Jesus Christ, to the twelve tribes which are in the Dispersion: Greetings.

야고보서 1:2.content: Count it all joy, my brothers, when you fall into various temptations,

야고보서 1:3.content: knowing that the testing of your faith produces endurance.

야고보서 1:4.content: Let endurance have its perfect work, that you may be perfect and complete, lacking in nothing.

야고보서 1:5.content: But if any of you lacks wisdom, let him ask of God, who gives to all liberally and without reproach, and it will be given to him.

야고보서 1:6.content: But let him ask in faith, without any doubting, for he who doubts is like a wave of the sea, driven by the wind and tossed.

야고보서 1:7.content: For that man shouldn’t think that he will receive anything from the Lord.

야고보서 1:8.content: He is a double-minded man, unstable in all his ways.

야고보서 1:9.content: But let the brother in humble circumstances glory in his high position;

야고보서 1:10.content: and the rich, in that he is made humble, because like the flower in the grass, he will pass away.

야고보서 1:11.content: For the sun arises with the scorching wind and withers the grass, and the flower in it falls, and the beauty of its appearance perishes. So the rich man will also fade away in his pursuits.

야고보서 1:12.content: Blessed is a person who endures temptation, for when he has been approved, he will receive the crown of life, which the Lord promised to those who love him.

야고보서 1:13.content: Let no man say when he is tempted, “I am tempted by God,” for God can’t be tempted by evil, and he himself tempts no one.

야고보서 1:14.content: But each one is tempted when he is drawn away by his own lust and enticed.

야고보서 1:15.content: Then the lust, when it has conceived, bears sin. The sin, when it is full grown, produces death.

야고보서 1:16.content: Don’t be deceived, my beloved brothers.

야고보서 1:17.content: Every good gift and every perfect gift is from above, coming down from the Father of lights, with whom can be no variation, nor turning shadow.

야고보서 1:18.content: Of his own will he gave birth to us by the word of truth, that we should be a kind of first fruits of his creatures.

야고보서 1:19.content: So, then, my beloved brothers, let every man be swift to hear, slow to speak, and slow to anger;

야고보서 1:20.content: for the anger of man doesn’t produce the righteousness of God.

야고보서 1:21.content: Therefore, putting away all filthiness and overflowing of wickedness, receive with humility the implanted word, which is able to save your souls.

야고보서 1:22.content: But be doers of the word, and not only hearers, deluding your own selves.

야고보서 1:23.content: For if anyone is a hearer of the word and not a doer, he is like a man looking at his natural face in a mirror;

야고보서 1:24.content: for he sees himself, and goes away, and immediately forgets what kind of man he was.

야고보서 1:25.content: But he who looks into the perfect law of freedom and continues, not being a hearer who forgets, but a doer of the work, this man will be blessed in what he does.

야고보서 1:26.content: If anyone among you thinks himself to be religious while he doesn’t bridle his tongue, but deceives his heart, this man’s religion is worthless.

야고보서 1:27.content: Pure religion and undefiled before our God and Father is this: to visit the fatherless and widows in their affliction, and to keep oneself unstained by the world.
